Nuzleaf

#0273 Seedot #0275 Shiftry
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Nuzleaf is a Grass/Dark type Pokémon introduced in Generation 3.

Nuzleaf

Additional artwork

Pokédex data

National № 0274
Type Grass Dark
Species Wily Pokémon
Height 1.0 m (3′03″)
Weight 28.0 kg (61.7 lbs)
Abilities 1. Chlorophyll
2. Early Bird
Pickpocket (hidden ability)
Local № 0023 (Ruby/Sapphire/Emerald)
0023 (Omega Ruby/Alpha Sapphire)
0040 (Sword/Shield)
0055 (The Teal Mask)

Training

EV yield 2 Attack
Catch rate 120 (15.7% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 50 (normal)
Base Exp. 119
Growth Rate Medium Slow

Breeding

Egg Groups Field, Grass
Gender 50% male, 50% female
Egg cycles 15 (3,599–3,855 steps)

Base stats

HP 70
250 344
Attack 70
130 262
Defense 40
76 196
Sp. Atk 60
112 240
Sp. Def 40
76 196
Speed 60
112 240
Total 340 Min Max

The ranges shown on the right are for a level 100 Pokémon. Maximum values are based on a beneficial nature, 252 EVs, 31 IVs; minimum values are based on a hindering nature, 0 EVs, 0 IVs.

The effectiveness of each type on Nuzleaf.

2½½½222½

Evolution chart

#0273
Seedot
Grass
(Level 14)
#0274
Nuzleaf
Grass · Dark
(use Leaf Stone)
#0275
Shiftry
Grass · Dark

Nuzleaf changes

  • In Generations 3-4, Nuzleaf has a base experience yield of 141.
  • In Generations 3-7, Nuzleaf has a base Friendship value of 70.

Pokédex entries

Ruby NUZLEAF live in densely overgrown forests. They occasionally venture out of the forest to startle people. This POKéMON dislikes having its long nose pinched.
Sapphire This POKéMON pulls out the leaf on its head and makes a flute with it. The sound of NUZLEAF’s flute strikes fear and uncertainty in the hearts of people lost in a forest.
FireRed
LeafGreen		 They live in holes bored in large trees. The sound of NUZLEAF’s grass flute fills listeners with dread.
Emerald A forest-dwelling POKéMON that is skilled at climbing trees. Its long and pointed nose is its weak point. It loses power if the nose is gripped.
Diamond
Pearl
Platinum		 The sound of its grass flute makes its listeners uneasy. It lives deep in forests.
HeartGold
SoulSilver		 It lives deep in forests. With the leaf on its head, it makes a flute whose song makes listeners uneasy.
Black
White
Black 2
White 2		 The sound of its grass flute makes its listeners uneasy. It lives deep in forests.
X The sound of its grass flute makes its listeners uneasy. It lives deep in forests.
Y It lives deep in forests. With the leaf on its head, it makes a flute whose song makes listeners uneasy.
Omega Ruby Nuzleaf live in densely overgrown forests. They occasionally venture out of the forest to startle people. This Pokémon dislikes having its long nose pinched.
Alpha Sapphire This Pokémon pulls out the leaf on its head and makes a flute with it. The sound of Nuzleaf’s flute strikes fear and uncertainty in the hearts of people lost in a forest.
Sword It lives deep in forests. With the leaf on its head, it makes a flute whose song makes listeners uneasy.
Shield They live in holes bored in large trees. The sound of Nuzleaf’s grass flute fills listeners with dread.
Brilliant Diamond
Shining Pearl		 The sound of its grass flute makes its listeners uneasy. It lives deep in the forest.

Legends: Z-A Scarlet/Violet

Moves learnt by level up

Nuzleaf does not learn any level up moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Moves learnt by TM

Nuzleaf cannot be taught any TM moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Nuzleaf learns the following moves when it evolves in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet (regardless of level).

Type
Cat.
Power
Acc.
Razor LeafGrass 55 95

Egg moves

Nuzleaf does not learn any moves by breeding in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet.

Name origin

nuzzle
to burrow with the nose
leaf
plant foliage
